# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

parameters: 
 - name: sqlServerNamePrefix   # Unique SQL Server Name (should not start with 'microsoft')    
 - default: myServer          // Default is "myserver" for all but optional if you're going to use custom server in other parts of the solution.    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - name: sqlDBName            // Unique SQL DB Name     # Default is "mysqldb" for all but optional if you're going to use custom database in other parts of the solution.    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - name: sqlUserName          // Unique SQL Server user for connecting from Azure Data Factory or PowerShell     # Default is "mylogin" and it'll be created on server if not exist, https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - name: sqlPassword          // Unique SQL Server password for connecting from Azure Data Factory or PowerShell     # Default is "My_password123!" and it'll be created on server if not exist, https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - name: location             // Region where resources are deployed     # Default is "eastus" and it'll be created on server if not exist, https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - name: adminLogin           // Username for the administrator login into SQL Server Management Studio     # Default is "adminuser" and it'll be created on server if not exist, https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - name: adminPassword        // Password for the administrator login into SQL Server Management Studio     # Default is "Admin_password123!" and it'll be created on server if not exist, https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - name: storageAccountName    // Unique Storage Account Name     # Default is "mystorage" and it'll be created on server if not exist, https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - name: storageAccountKey      // Unique Storage Account Key     # Default is "mustcontainaadstoragekey", it'll be created on server if not exist, https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
resources: 
 - [sqlServerNamePrefix],   // Unique SQL Server Name (should start with a letter or number and it'll be used in the Azure resource names)    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - [sqlDBName],             // Unique SQL DB Name (should start with a letter or number and it'll be used in the Azure resource names)    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - sqlUserName,              // Unique SQL Server user for connecting from PowerShell     (https://stackoverflow.com/questions/40871329)    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - sqlPassword,              // Unique SQL Server password for connecting from PowerShell (https://stackoverflow.com/questions/40871329)    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - location,                 // Region where resources are deployed (https://stackoverflow.com/questions/40871329)    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - adminLogin,               // Username for the administrator login into SQL Server Management Studio (https://stackoverflow.com/questions/40871329)    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - adminPassword,            // Password for the administrator login into SQL Server Management Studio (https://stackoverflow.com/questions/40871329)    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - storageAccountName,       // Unique Storage Account Name (https://stackoverflow.com/questions/40871329)    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
 - storageAccountKey          // Unique Storage Account Key (https://stackoverflow.com/questions/40871329)    https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/architecture/guide/concepts/data-factory-and-integration-runs
